nameMeanings.name: Leigh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places (in at least sixteen counties, but especially Leigh in Lancashire) named either with the nominative case of Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’ (see Lee ) or with lēage, a late dative form of this word (see Lye ).
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 李, based on its Cantonese pronunciation. See   Li   1.

variants.name: Leah
meanings: Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 李 and 利, see   Li   1 and 3.

variants.name: Lee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sang, Jae, Jong, Jung, Sung, Yong, Kyung, Seung, Dong, Kwang, Myung.

English: topographic name for someone who lived near a meadow or a patch of arable land, Middle English lee, lea, from Old English lēa, dative case (used after a preposition) of lēah, which originally meant ‘wood or glade’.

English: habitational name from any of the many places in England named with Old English lēah ‘wood, glade’, including Lee in Buckinghamshire, Essex, Hampshire, Kent, and Shropshire, and Lea in Cheshire, Derbyshire, Herefordshire, Lancashire, Lincolnshire, and Wiltshire.

nameMeanings.name: Giles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Much altered English vernacular form of the Late Latin name Aegidius, from Greek Aigidios (a derivative of aigidion ‘kid, young goat’), via Old French Gide. It was the name of an 8th‐century saint who, according to tradition, was an Athenian citizen who fled to Provence because he could not cope with the fame and adulation caused by his power to work miracles, in particular by healing the lame and crippled. This was not a particularly common name in the Middle Ages and its use seems to have been confined to certain families and localities.

en.lifeSummary: When Giles Leigh was born in 1470, in England, his father, Henry Leigh of Walton, was 26 and his mother, Margaret Bold Leigh of Walton, was 22. He married Catherine in 1490, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. He was buried in Walton-on-thames, Surrey, England.

ko.lifeSummary: Giles Leigh(이)가 1470년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Leigh of Walton(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Bold Leigh of Walton(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1490년 영국에서 Catherine(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 영국 수리 월토--섬스에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Giles Leigh родился в 1470 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени Henry Leigh of Walton было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Bold Leigh of Walton, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Catherine в 1490 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Он был похоронен в местности валтон-он-тамесь, сурри, Англия.
